# Handoff

## Source Agent

[Planner, implementer, reviewer, validator, Orion, or named agent]

## Target Agent

[Planner, implementer, reviewer, validator, Orion, or named agent]

## Objective

[One sentence describing the work to perform]

## Context

[Relevant repository state, request summary, linked documents, and assumptions]

## Decisions Already Made

- [Decision 1]
- [Decision 2]

## Scope Contract

- Selected PR ID or title: [Identifier]
- Included scope summary: [What is explicitly included]
- Excluded scope summary: [What is explicitly excluded]
- Out-of-scope follow-up trigger: [When to stop and report follow-up]

## Files In Scope

- `[path]` — [why this file may change]

## Files Out Of Scope

- `[path]` — [why this file should not change]

## Constraints

- Preserve existing behavior unless explicitly changed.
- Keep the change small and reviewable.
- Do not implement future PRs.
- Do not implement directly on `main`; use a scoped branch.
- Do not introduce unrelated dependencies or tooling.
- Follow existing repository patterns.

## Branch And Merge Policy

- Current working branch: [Branch name]
- Branch gate check required: `git status -sb`
- If branch is `main`: stop and create branch `git switch -c <type>/<short-pr-slug>`
- Merge strategy policy: `--squash` by default

## Validation Required

- [Command or manual check]
- [Expected evidence]

## Validation Evidence Format

- Commands executed: [Exact commands]
- Result status per check: [Pass/Fail/Skipped/Blocked]
- Evidence location: [CLI output, file path, line references, CI URL]
- Untested areas and reasons: [List]

## Known Risks

- [Risk]
- [Impact]
- [Mitigation or validation step]

## Stop Conditions

- [Condition that should stop the target agent]

## Escalation Path

- Blocking issue: [Issue]
- Required decision owner: [User/reviewer/maintainer]
- Smallest safe next step: [Action]

## Expected Output

- [Summary item]
- [Validation evidence]
- [Final recommendation]
